# Drag-and-drop email import from Thunderbird (2026-02-23 11:05Z)

_**User**_

### Задача: Реализовать Drag-and-Drop зону для импорта писем из Thunderbird (.eml)

**Контекст:**
У меня есть HTML-структура: 
<div id="emailDropZone" class="email-drop-zone">...</div>.
Мне нужно превратить её в функциональный компонент, который принимает перетаскиваемое письмо из десктопного приложения Thunderbird, парсит его и сохраняет данные в базу LEAD. Это должно работать с такой же логикой как и получения письма от лида на ящик notifikations то есть проверять по почтовому ящику есть ли клиент в базе и если есть то создавать с ним чат если чата нет или добавить Notiz с пометкой импорт в уже существующий чат как это сделано <button class="MuiButtonBasen</span>Als Notiz in Chat übernehmen<span class="MuiTouchRipple-root css-r3djoj-MuiTouchRipple-root"></span></button>. но сообщение должно быть в правильном порядке в окне чата то есть расположено и отсортировано по времени письма.

**Технические требования:**
1. **Frontend (Drag-and-Drop):**
   - Реализуй обработчики `onDragOver`, `onDragLeave` и `onDrop`.
   - При `onDrop` нужно получить файл (обычно это формат .eml или application/octet-stream).
   - Визуально подсвечивай зону, когда над ней держат файл.

2. **Parsing (Обработка письма):**
   - Используй библиотеку для парсинга писем (например, 'mailparser' для Node.js или 'js-mail-parser' для фронтенда).
   - Из заголовка "From" нужно извлечь:
     - Full Name (Раздели его на First Name и Last Name).
     - Email address.
   - Из тела письма нужно извлечь основной текст сообщения.
   - Из заголовка "Subject" извлечь тему.

3. **Backend & Database:**
   - Создай API-эндпоинт (или Server Action, если это Next.js) для получения этих данных.
   - Напиши логику сохранения в базу данных (используй [укажи свою БД, например, Prisma/PostgreSQL/MongoDB]).
   - Поля в базе: email, first_name, last_name, message, subject, created_at.

4. **Обработка ошибок:**
   - Если файл не является письмом, выведи уведомление (Toast).
   - Если имя отправителя пустое, используй часть email до символа @ как имя.

**Стиль кода:**
- Используй TypeScript.
- Для стилизации используй Tailwind CSS.
- Код должен быть чистым, модульным и с комментариями.

---

REFERENCE\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Scoring Thresholds\\\\\\\\n- **0-39**: Cold (Nurture)\\\\\\\\n- **40-79**: Warm/MQL (Route to pipeline if intent known)\\\\\\\\n- **80-119**: Hot/SQL (Slack alert)\\\\\\\\n- **120+**: Very Hot (Immediate contact)\\\\\\\\n- **Order placed**: Auto-customer\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Intent Detection\\\\\\\\n- **Research**: Academic email, PhD title, small volume, 16S pricing page\\\\\\\\n- **B2B**: ROI calculator, enterprise page, high volume, Director title\\\\\\\\n- **Co-Creation**: Partnership page, custom panel inquiry, VP/C-level title\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection for the biotech industry.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Event Ingestion**: Receive marketing events from multiple channels (Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Conferences)\\\\\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay mechanism\\\\\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic detection of product intent (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\\\\\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent routing to the correct pipeline based on score + intent\\\\\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated stage movements, notifications, and task creation\\\\\\\\n- **Integrations**: Moco (German finance) and Slack (alerts &amp; notifications)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Component | Technology |\\\\\\\\n|-----------|------------|\\\\\\\\n| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |\\\\\\\\n| Framework | Fastify |\\\\\\\\n| Database | PostgreSQL 15+ |\\\\\\\\n| Queue | Redis + BullMQ |\\\\\\\\n| Language | TypeScript (strict) |\\\\\\\\n| Validation | Zod |\\\\\\\\n| Migrations | node-pg-migrate |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 20+\\\\\\\\n- Docker and Docker Compose\\\\\\\\n- npm v9+\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Quick Start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. Clone and Install\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ngit clone &lt;repository-url&gt;\\\\\\\\ncd dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. Environment Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Copy example environment file\\\\\\\\ncp env.example .env\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Edit .env with your configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. Start Infrastructure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Start PostgreSQL and Redis\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose up -d\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Wait for services to be healthy\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose ps\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4. Run Migrations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Apply database migrations\\\\\\\\nnpm run migrate:up\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Or manually:\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200001_seed-pipelines.sql\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5. Seed Data (Optional)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm run seed\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 6. Start Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 1: Start API server with hot reload\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 2: Start background workers\\\\\\\\nnpm run workers\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":1},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":2},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"A custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; директорию\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Создай папку для проекта\\\\\\\\nmkdir dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\ncd dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Инициализируй Git\\\\\\\\ngit init\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 0.3 Скачай документацию\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nСоздай папку &#96;docs/&#96; и положи туда оба файла Master Prompt:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;docs/MASTER_PROMPT_PART1.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- &#96;docs/MASTER_PROMPT_PART2.md&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nmkdir docs\\\\\\\\n# Скопируй файлы Master Prompt в эту папку\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 0.4 Открой проект в Cursor\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncursor .\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 0.5 Настрой Cursor Rules\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Открой Settings: &#96;Cmd+,&#96; (Mac) / &#96;Ctrl+,&#96; (Windows)\\\\\\\\n2. Найди \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Rules for AI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n3. Вставь эти правила:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n# DNA Marketing Engine - Project Rules\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Context\\\\\\\\nBuilding a custom Marketing CRM with:\\\\\\\\n- Event-driven architecture (webhooks → queue → workers)\\\\\\\\n- Lead scoring with decay\\\\\\\\n- Intent detection (research/b2b/co_creation)\\\\\\\\n- Smart routing to pipelines\\\\\\\\n- No HubSpot - fully custom\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack (ALWAYS USE)\\\\\\\\n- Runtime: Node.js 20 LTS\\\\\\\\n- Language: TypeScript (strict mode)\\\\\\\\n- Framework: Fastify (NOT Express)\\\\\\\\n- Database: PostgreSQL 15\\\\\\\\n- Queue: BullMQ with Redis\\\\\\\\n- Validation: Zod\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Code Style\\\\\\\\n- ES Modules (import/export, NOT require)\\\\\\\\n- Async/await (NOT callbacks)\\\\\\\\n- Proper error handling with try/catch\\\\\\\\n- Use 'pg' package for PostgreSQL (NOT Prisma, NOT Drizzle for now)\\\\\\\\n- File naming: camelCase.ts for files, PascalCase for classes\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture Patterns\\\\\\\\n- Services: Business logic (scoringEngine.ts, leadService.ts)\\\\\\\\n- Workers: Background jobs (eventWorker.ts, routingWorker.ts)\\\\\\\\n- Routes: API endpoints (events.ts, leads.ts)\\\\\\\\n- Types: TypeScript interfaces (types/index.ts)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Key Domain Concepts\\\\\\\\n- Lead starts in \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Global Pool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (pipeline_id = NULL)\\\\\\\\n- Score = demographic + engagement + behavior\\\\\\\\n- Intent = research | b2b | co_creation (detected from events)\\\\\\\\n- Route when: score &gt;= 40 AND intent_confidence &gt;= 60%\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"git --version     # Нужен 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine — Projekt-Dokumentation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Version:** 1.0.0  \\\\\\\\n**Stand:** Februar 2026\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Inhaltsverzeichnis\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. [Überblick](#überblick)\\\\\\\\n2. [Was kann es jetzt (MVP)?](#was-kann-es-jetzt-mvp)\\\\\\\\n3. [Phase 2 &amp; Roadmap](#phase-2--roadmap)\\\\\\\\n4. [Technische Architektur](#technische-architektur)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Überblick\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**DNA Marketing Engine** ist eine maßgeschneiderte CRM-Plattform für die Biotech-Branche mit Smart Routing und Intent Detection. Sie verbindet Marketing-Events aus verschiedenen Kanälen, bewertet Leads automatisch und leitet sie intelligent in die passenden Sales-Pipelines.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Was kann es jetzt (MVP)?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### ✅ Kern-CRM\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Modul | Status | Beschreibung |\\\\\\\\n|-------|--------|--------------|\\\\\\\\n| **Leads** | ✅ Vollständig | CRUD, Suche, Filter, Event-Timeline, Score-Historie, Intent-Signale, manuelles Routing |\\\\\\\\n| **Deals** | ✅ Vollständig | Kanban-Board (Drag &amp; Drop), CRUD, Stage-Bewegung, Close (Won/Lost) |\\\\\\\\n| **Organizations** | ✅ Vollständig | CRUD, Verknüpfung mit Leads |\\\\\\\\n| **Pipelines** | ✅ Vollständig | Liste, Detailansicht, Metriken, Stage-Konfiguration |\\\\\\\\n| **Tasks** | ✅ Vollständig | CRUD, Zuordnung zu Deals/Leads, Erledigen |\\\\\\\\n| **Events** | ✅ Vollständig | Event-Ingestion, Timeline pro Lead |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### ✅ Smart Routing &amp; Scoring\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Event Ingestion**: Events aus Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Konferenzen\\\\\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Echtzeit-Scoring mit konfigurierbaren Regeln und Decay\\\\\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatische Erkennung (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\\\\\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Automatisches Routing bei Score ≥ 40 und Intent ≥ 60 %\\\\\\\\n- **Routing-Konfiguration**: Schwellenwerte und Regeln über API anpassbar\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### ✅ Automatisierung\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automatische Stage-Bewegungen, Benachrichtigungen, Task-Erstellung\\\\\\\\n- **Triggers**: Trigger-basierte Automatisierungen\\\\\\\\n- **Background Workers**: Event-, Routing-, Sync-, Decay-, Email-Sequence-Worker\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### ✅ Authentifizierung &amp; Sicherheit\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **JWT-basierte Auth**: Login, Registrierung\\\\\\\\n- **2FA (TOTP)**: Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine — Projekt-Dokumentation\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":1},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":2},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**Version:** 1.0.0  \\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":3},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**Stand:** Februar 2026\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":4},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":5},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"---\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":6},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":7},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## Inhaltsverzeichnis\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":9},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. [Überblick](#überblick)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":10},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"2. package.json with:\\\\\\\\n   - name: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n   - type: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"module\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n   - scripts: dev, build, start, workers\\\\\\\\n   - dependencies: fastify, @fastify/cors, bullmq, ioredis, pg, zod, uuid, dayjs, pino, axios\\\\\\\\n   - devDependencies: typescript, @types/node, @types/pg, tsx, vitest\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. tsconfig.json with strict TypeScript, ES2022 target, NodeNext modules\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. .env.example with:\\\\\\\\n   - DATABASE_URL\\\\\\\\n   - REDIS_URL\\\\\\\\n   - PORT\\\\\\\\n   - WEBHOOK_SECRET\\\\\\\\n   - JWT_SECRET\\\\\\\\n   - SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL\\\\\\\\n   - MOCO_API_KEY\\\\\\\\n   - MOCO_SUBDOMAIN\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n4. .gitignore for Node.js project (node_modules, dist, .env, etc.)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n5. Create empty folder structure:\\\\\\\\n   - src/api/routes/\\\\\\\\n   - src/api/middleware/\\\\\\\\n   - src/services/\\\\\\\\n   - src/workers/\\\\\\\\n   - src/integrations/\\\\\\\\n   - src/db/migrations/\\\\\\\\n   - src/config/\\\\\\\\n   - src/types/\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1.2 Установи зависимости\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nПосле того как Cursor создаст файлы, выполни в терминале:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1.3 Создай .env файл\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncp .env.example .env\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nОтредактируй &#96;.env&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nDATABASE_URL=postgres://dna:devpassword@localhost:5432/dna_marketing\\\\\\\\nREDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379\\\\\\\\nPORT=3000\\\\\\\\nWEBHOOK_SECRET=dev_webhook_secret_32chars_min\\\\\\\\nJWT_SECRET=dev_jwt_secret_32characters_min\\\\\\\\nSLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz\\\\\\\\nMOCO_API_KEY=your_moco_key\\\\\\\\nMOCO_SUBDOMAIN=your_company\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1.4 Создай docker-compose.yml\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**В Cursor Chat:**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nCreate docker-compose.yml with:\\\\\\\\n1. =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Initial Schema Migration\\\\\\\\n-- PostgreSQL 15+\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Enable UUID extension\\\\\\\\nCREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uuid-ossp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- ORGANIZATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE organizations (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    domain          VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    industry        VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    company_size    VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    country         VARCHAR(2),\\\\\\\\n    portal_id       VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\\\\\\\\n    moco_id         VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- PIPELINES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE pipelines (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\\\\\\\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    description     TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n    is_default      BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n    sales_cycle_days INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    target_persona  VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    config          JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- PIPELINE STAGES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE pipeline_stages (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    pipeline_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipelines(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    position        INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    stage_type      VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    automation_config JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    UNIQUE(pipeline_id, slug),\\\\\\\\n    UNIQUE(pipeline_id, position)\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- LEADS (with Smart Routing fields)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE leads (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- Identity\\\\\\\\n    email           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\\\\\\\n    first_name      VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    last_name       VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    phone           VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    job_title       VARCHAR(150),\\\\\\\\n    organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id),\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- Status\\\\\\\\n    status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',\\\\\\\\n    lifecycle_stage VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'lead',\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- SCORING\\\\\\\\n    demographic_score   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    engagement_score    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    behavior_score      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    total_score         INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS \\\\\\\\n                        (demographic_score + engagement_score + behavior_score) STORED,\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- SMART ROUTING (CRITICAL!)\\\\\\\\n    pipeline_id         UUID REFERENCES pipelines(id),\\\\\\\\n    routing_status      VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unrouted',\\\\\\\\n    routed_at           TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    primary_intent      VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    intent_confidence   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n    intent_summary      JSONB DEFAULT '{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"research\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"b2b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"co_creation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0}',\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- Attribution\\\\\\\\n    first_touch_source      VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    first_touch_campaign    VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    first_touch_date        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    last_touch_source       VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    last_touch_campaign     VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    last_touch_date         TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    -- External IDs\\\\\\\\n    portal_id           VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":490}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"d5ce693a-1392-4213-8bea-1870397e38c4\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"6161bf48-35ab-4649-8f49-3e7024d17722\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-23T12:33:57.259Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection for the biotech industry.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Event Ingestion**: Receive marketing events from multiple channels (Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Conferences)\\\\\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay mechanism\\\\\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic detection of product intent (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\\\\\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent routing to the correct pipeline based on score + intent\\\\\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated stage movements, notifications, and task creation\\\\\\\\n- **Integrations**: Moco (German finance) and Slack (alerts &amp; notifications)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Component | Technology |\\\\\\\\n|-----------|------------|\\\\\\\\n| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |\\\\\\\\n| Framework | Fastify |\\\\\\\\n| Database | PostgreSQL 15+ |\\\\\\\\n| Queue | Redis + BullMQ |\\\\\\\\n| Language | TypeScript (strict) |\\\\\\\\n| Validation | Zod |\\\\\\\\n| Migrations | node-pg-migrate |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 20+\\\\\\\\n- Docker and Docker Compose\\\\\\\\n- npm v9+\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Quick Start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. Clone and Install\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ngit clone &lt;repository-url&gt;\\\\\\\\ncd dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. Environment Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Copy example environment file\\\\\\\\ncp env.example .env\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Edit .env with your configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. Start Infrastructure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Start PostgreSQL and Redis\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose up -d\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Wait for services to be healthy\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose ps\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4. Run Migrations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Apply database migrations\\\\\\\\nnpm run migrate:up\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Or manually:\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200001_seed-pipelines.sql\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5. Seed Data (Optional)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm run seed\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 6. Start Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 1: Start API server with hot reload\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 2: Start background workers\\\\\\\\nnpm run workers\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe server will be available at &#96;http://localhost:3000&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\\\\\\\n│                           DNA Marketing Engine                           │\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│                                                                         │\\\\\\\\n│  └──────┬──────┘               │\\\\\\\\n│          │                  │                  │ =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/db/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// PostgreSQL Database Connection Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport pg from 'pg';\\\\\\\\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst { Pool } = pg;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Pool Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\\\\\\\\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\\\\\\\\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\\\\\\\\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet pool: pg.Pool | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getPool(): pg.Pool {\\\\\\\\n  if (!pool) {\\\\\\\\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('✅ PostgreSQL client connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('❌ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('PostgreSQL client removed from pool');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (12 total migration files)\\\\n│\\\\n├── scripts/                    # Utility scripts\\\\n├── deploy/                     # Deployment configurations\\\\n├── docs/                       # Documentation\\\\n├── package.json               # Backend package.json\\\\n├── tsconfig.json              # TypeScript config\\\\n├── migrate-config.json        # Migration config\\\\n└── README.md\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 3. Database\\\\n\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL 15+\\\\n- **ORM/Migration Tool**: &#96;node-pg-migrate&#96; (raw SQL migrations)\\\\n- **Connection**: Native &#96;pg&#96; library with connection pooling\\\\n- **Migrations Location**: &#96;migrations/&#96; directory (12 migration files)\\\\n- **Schema**: Includes tables for:\\\\n  - Organizations, Leads, Deals, Pipelines, Pipeline Stages\\\\n  - Events, Tasks, Scoring Rules, Automation Rules\\\\n  - Email Sequences, Conversations, Messages\\\\n  - Team Members, Integration Settings\\\\n\\\\n### 4. Package.json Location &amp; Key Dependencies\\\\n\\\\n**Backend (&#96;package.json&#96; at root):**\\\\n- **Web Framework**: &#96;fastify@^4.26.1&#96;\\\\n- **Database**: &#96;pg@^8.11.3&#96;, &#96;node-pg-migrate@^7.0.0&#96;\\\\n- **Queue System**: &#96;bullmq@^5.1.6&#96;, &#96;ioredis@^5.3.2&#96;\\\\n- **Auth**: &#96;@fastify/jwt@^8.0.1&#96;, &#96;bcryptjs@^3.0.3&#96;, &#96;otplib@^13.3.0&#96;\\\\n- **Email**: &#96;nodemailer@^7.0.12&#96;, &#96;mailparser@^3.9.3&#96;, &#96;imap@^0.8.19&#96;\\\\n- **Validation**: &#96;zod@^3.22.4&#96;\\\\n- **Logging**: &#96;pino@^8.18.0&#96;, &#96;pino-pretty@^10.3.1&#96;\\\\n- **Dev Tools**: &#96;typescript@^5.3.3&#96;, &#96;tsx@^4.7.0&#96;, &#96;vitest@^1.2.2&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Frontend (&#96;frontend/package.json&#96;):**\\\\n- **Core**: &#96;react@^19.2.0&#96;, &#96;react-dom@^19.2.0&#96;\\\\n- **Admin**: &#96;react-admin@^5.13.6&#96;\\\\n- **UI**: &#96;@mui/material@^7.3.7&#96;, &#96;@mui/x-data-grid@^8.26.0&#96;\\\\n- **Build**: &#96;vite@^7.2.4&#96;, &#96;@vitejs/plugin-react@^5.1.1&#96;\\\\n- **Styling**: &#96;tailwindcss@^3.4.19&#96;, &#96;@emotion/react@^11.14.0&#96;\\\\n- **Charts**: &#96;recharts@^3.7.0&#96;\\\\n- **Drag &amp; Drop**: &#96;@dnd-kit/core@^6.3.1&#96;, &#96;@hello-pangea/dnd@^18.0.1&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 5. Architecture Pattern\\\\n\\\\n**Architecture**: Monorepo with separated backend and frontend\\\\n\\\\n**Backend Architecture**:\\\\n- **Layered Architecture**:\\\\n  - **API Layer** (&#96;api/routes/&#96;): Fastify route handlers\\\\n  - **Service Layer** (&#96;services/&#96;): Business logic\\\\n  - **Data Layer** (&#96;db/&#96;): Database access\\\\n  - **Worker Layer** (&#96;workers/&#96;): Background job processing\\\\n- **Queue-Based Processing**: BullMQ with Redis for async tasks\\\\n- **Event-Driven**: Event ingestion → scoring → routing → automation\\\\n- **Microservices-Ready**: Separate worker processes, configurable integrations\\\\n\\\\n**Frontend Architecture**:\\\\n- **React Admin Framework**: Admin interface built on React Admin\\\\n- **Component-Based**: Modular components organized by feature\\\\n- **Provider Pattern**: Data and auth providers for state management\\\\n- **Resource-Based**: React Admin resources for CRUD operations\\\\n\\\\n**Key Features**:\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic product intent detection\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent pipeline routing based on score + intent\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated workflows and notifications\\\\n- **Email Sequences**: Automated email campaigns\\\\n- **Chat System**: Real-time conversations with leads\\\\n- **Integrations**: Moco, Slack, Cituro\\\\n\\\\n**Infrastructure**:\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL with connection pooling\\\\n- **Cache/Queue**: Redis for BullMQ job queues\\\\n- **Authentication**: JWT-based with 2FA support\\\\n- **API Security**: HMAC signature validation, API keys, rate limiting\\\\n\\\\nThis is a CRM platform for biotech marketing with lead scoring, intent detection, and automated routing.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1771845046093,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"Explore Now frontend: add a way to fetch events. In react-admin we could add a custom resource \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"events\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with getList that calls GET /events. Or we just call the API directly in RecentActivitiesCard. The simplest is to add getList('events') in dataProvider that calls GET /events?limit=limit&amp;offset=offset (with pagination). Let me check how react-admin getList works - it usually expects { data, total }. Our API returns { data }. We don't have total from the backend. We could add total count in the backend (SELECT COUNT(*) ...) or the frontend can just use page size and \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"load more\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / pagination without total. For simplicity I'll return total: data.length when limit is requested, so we know if there are more. Actually for proper pagination we need total. plan.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":13251,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# CSV-Import: Kunden (Organisationen) und Kontakte (Leads)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Kontext\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- **Leads** = Kontakte (E-Mail, Name, Telefon, Firma …), Tabelle &amp;#96;leads&amp;#96;, verknüpft mit &amp;#96;organization_id&amp;#96;.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- **Organisationen** = Firmen (Name, Domain, Branche, Land …), Tabelle &amp;#96;organizations&amp;#96;.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Bereits vorhanden:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - [POST /api/v1/leads/bulk](src/api/routes/events.ts) – nimmt ein JSON-Array von Leads (inkl. &amp;#96;company_name&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;company_domain&amp;#96;) und stellt Jobs in die Queue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - [eventWorker](src/workers/eventWorker.ts) erzeugt den Lead und ruft &amp;#96;createOrLinkOrganization(leadId, metadata)&amp;#96; auf – Organisation wird anhand &amp;#96;company_domain&amp;#96; gesucht oder mit &amp;#96;company_name&amp;#96; (+ optional domain) angelegt und der Lead verknüpft.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nEine CSV-Zeile wird also als {\\\\\\\\n    // Validate that at least lead_id or deal_id is provided\\\\\\\\n    if (!data.lead_id &amp;&amp; !data.deal_id) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new ValidationError('Either lead_id or deal_id must be provided');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If deal_id is provided, validate it exists\\\\\\\\n    if (data.deal_id) {\\\\\\\\n      const deal = await db.queryOne&lt;{ id: string; lead_id: string }&gt;(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT id, lead_id FROM deals WHERE id = $1',\\\\\\\\n        [data.deal_id]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (!deal) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new NotFoundError('Deal', data.deal_id);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      // Auto-populate lead_id from the deal if not provided\\\\\\\\n      if (!data.lead_id &amp;&amp; // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Finds an active conversation for a lead/deal pair, or creates a new one.\\\\\\\\n   * Used by EmailSyncService when matching incoming emails.\\\\\\\\n   * @param initiatedByLead - true when the conversation was started by the lead (e.g. first message was inbound)\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async findOrCreateConversation(\\\\\\\\n    leadId: string | null,\\\\\\\\n    dealId: string | null,\\\\\\\\n    createdById: string,\\\\\\\\n    subject?: string,\\\\\\\\n    initiatedByLead: boolean = false\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;Conversation&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!leadId &amp;&amp; !dealId) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new ValidationError('Either lead_id or deal_id must be provided');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Try to find existing active conversation\\\\\\\\n    const conditions: string[] = [&#96;status = 'active'&#96;];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    let paramIdx = 1;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (dealId) {\\\\\\\\n      conditions.push(&#96;deal_id = $${paramIdx}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      params.push(dealId);\\\\\\\\n      paramIdx++;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (leadId &amp;&amp; !dealId) {\\\\\\\\n      conditions.push(&#96;lead_id = $${paramIdx}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      params.push(leadId);\\\\\\\\n      paramIdx++;\\\\\\\\n      conditions.push('deal_id IS NULL');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await db.queryOne&lt;Conversation&gt;(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT * FROM conversations\\\\\\\\n       WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      params\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (existing) return existing;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Create new conversation\\\\\\\\n    const conversation = await db.queryOne&lt;Conversation&gt;(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO conversations (\\\\\\\\n        lead_id, deal_id, type, status, subject,\\\\\\\\n        participant_emails, created_by_id, initiated_by_lead,\\\\\\\\n        created_at, updated_at\\\\\\\\n      ) VALUES (\\\\\\\\n        $1, $2, 'direct', 'active', $3,\\\\\\\\n        '[]'::jsonb, $4, $5,\\\\\\\\n        NOW(), NOW()\\\\\\\\n      )\\\\\\\\n      RETURNING *&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [leadId, dealId, subject ?? null, createdById, initiatedByLead]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!conversation) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new BusinessLogicError('Failed to create conversation');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return conversation;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n  // Delete Conversation (hard delete, admin only or cascade =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Chat System Migration\\\\\\\\n-- Adds conversations, messages, email_accounts, linkedin_connections tables\\\\\\\\n-- with GIN indexes for JSONB fields, sender_id, email_thread_id, status tracking\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Up Migration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- CONVERSATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- Zentrale Tabelle für Chat-Konversationen (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE conversations (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    lead_id             UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    deal_id             UUID REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    type                VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    participant_emails  JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    last_message_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_by_id       UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- Mindestens lead_id ODER deal_id muss gesetzt sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_entity CHECK (lead_id IS NOT NULL OR deal_id IS NOT NULL),\\\\\\\\n    -- type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_type CHECK (type IN ('direct', 'group', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_status CHECK (status IN ('active', 'archived', 'closed'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- MESSAGES\\\\\\\\n-- Speichert alle Nachrichten (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen, Aufgaben)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE messages (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY async function conversationsRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    async (request, reply) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const paramResult = conversationIdParamSchema.safeParse(request.params);\\\\\\\\n      if (!paramResult.success) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new ValidationError('Invalid conversation ID', {\\\\\\\\n          validationErrors: paramResult.error.errors,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const bodyResult = createMessageSchema.safeParse(request.body);\\\\\\\\n      if (!bodyResult.success) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new ValidationError('Invalid message data', {\\\\\\\\n          validationErrors: bodyResult.error.errors,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const user = request.user;\\\\\\\\n      const message = await messageService.createMessage(\\\\\\\\n        paramResult.data.id,\\\\\\\\n        bodyResult.data,\\\\\\\\n        user.id\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      request.log.info(\\\\\\\\n        { messageId: message.id, conversationId: paramResult.data.id, type: message.message_type },\\\\\\\\n        'Message created'\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return reply.code(201).send(message);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Manual.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"range\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":185},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":242}},\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Pipelines are the **template** for deal phases. When creating a deal, you select a pipeline and stage. On the **Deal Kanban**, deals are grouped by stage; you can drag and drop deals between stages.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 10. Chats &amp; Communication\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe **chat overview** is located under **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Communication → Chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Layout\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Left side:** List of conversations with **tabs**:\\\\\\\\n  - **All:** all conversations\\\\\\\\n  - **Direct:** direct conversations (type = direct)\\\\\\\\n  - **Internal:** internal conversations (type = internal)\\\\\\\\n  - **Group:** group conversations (type = group)\\\\\\\\n- **Right side:** The selected **chat** (history and input field).\\\\\\\\n- **Search** and **Refresh** in the sidebar.\\\\\\\\n- **Plus button (+):** Create a new conversation.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Every Chat = Communication with a Lead\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Every conversation is assigned to a **lead** (or will be).\\\\\\\\n- **New email from a customer:** If the customer writes **first** and is **not yet in the database**, a **lead card (customer)** can be created automatically; the message appears in the chats.\\\\\\\\n- In the lead card, the **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Chats\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"** button opens exactly the chats belonging to this lead.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Creating a New Conversation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Click the **Plus button (+)**.\\\\\\\\n2. Select a **Lead** (search by name or email; min. 2 characters).\\\\\\\\n3. Optionally enter a **Subject**.\\\\\\\\n4. Choose a **Type**: Direct, Internal, or Group.\\\\\\\\n5. Click **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Create\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe new conversation appears in the list; you can start writing messages immediately.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n![alt text](image-6.png)\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 11. Deals: List and Kanban View\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nYou can manage deals under **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Deals\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**. There are **two views**.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### List View\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Table** of deals: Name, Pipeline, Stage, Value, Due Date, possibly email sequence status, etc.\\\\\\\\n- Search and filters (e.g., by pipeline/stage).\\\\\\\\n- **Create:** Create a new deal.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Kanban View\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- The **toggle** in the toolbar (list icon / Kanban icon) switches to the **Kanban board view**.\\\\\\\\n- Columns = **Stages** of the selected pipeline.\\\\\\\\n- **Cards** = Deals; you can **drag and drop** deals to another stage.\\\\\\\\n- Moving deals can trigger **automations** (see next section).\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Pipelines are the **template** for deal phases. When creating a deal, you select a pipeline and stage. On the **Deal Kanban**, deals are grouped by stage; you can drag and drop deals between stages.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":186},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":187},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"---\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":188},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":189},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## 10. Chats &amp; Communication\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":190},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":191},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"The **chat overview** is located under **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Communication → Chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":192},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":193},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Layout\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":194},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":195},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **Left side:** List of conversations with **tabs**:\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":196},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  - **All:** all conversations\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":197},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  - **Direct:** direct conversations (type = direct)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":198},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  - **Internal:** internal conversations (type = internal)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":199},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  - **Group:** group conversations (type = group)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":200},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **Right side:** The selected **chat** (history and input field).\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":201},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **Search** and **Refresh** in the sidebar.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":202},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **Plus button (+):** Create a new conversation.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":203},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":204},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Every Chat = Communication with a Lead\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":205},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":206},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- Every conversation is assigned to a **lead** (or will be).\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":207},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **New email from a customer:** If the customer writes **first** and is **not yet in the database**, a **lead card (customer)** can be created automatically; the message appears in the chats.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":208},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- In the lead card, the **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Chats\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"** button opens exactly the chats belonging to this lead.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":209},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":210},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":211},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Creating a New Conversation\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":212},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":213},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. Click the **Plus button (+)**.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":214},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"2. Select a **Lead** (search by name or email; min. 2 characters).\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":215},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"3. Optionally enter a **Subject**.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":216},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"4. Choose a **Type**: Direct, Internal, or Group.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":217},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"5. Click **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Create\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":218},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":219},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"The new conversation appears in the list; you can start writing messages immediately.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":220},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":221},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"![alt text](image-6.png)\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":222},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"---\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":223},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":224},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## 11. der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_direction CHECK (direction IN ('inbound', 'outbound', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Auto-populate recipients for outbound emails from the lead's email\\\\\\\\n    if (\\\\\\\\n      data.message_type === 'email' &amp;&amp;\\\\\\\\n      direction === 'outbound' &amp;&amp;\\\\\\\\n      (!data.recipients || data.recipients.length === 0) &amp;&amp;\\\\\\\\n      conversation.lead_id\\\\\\\\n    ) {\\\\\\\\n      const lead = await db.queryOne&lt;{ email: string; first_name: string | null; last_name: string | null }&gt;(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT email, first_name, last_name FROM leads WHERE id = $1',\\\\\\\\n        [conversation.lead_id]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (lead?.email) {\\\\\\\\n        const name = [lead.first_name, lead.last_name].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || undefined;\\\\\\\\n        data.recipients = [{ email: lead.email, name, type: 'to' as const }];\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Auto-populate sender info from team member if not provided\\\\\\\\n    if (direction === 'outbound' &amp;&amp; userId &amp;&amp; !data.sender_email) {\\\\\\\\n      const member = await db.queryOne&lt;{ email: string; name: string | null }&gt;(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT email, name FROM team_members WHERE id = $1',\\\\\\\\n        [userId]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (member) {\\\\\\\\n        data.sender_email = member.email;\\\\\\\\n        data.sender_name = data.sender_name ?? member.name ?? undefined;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Determine initial status\\\\\\\\n    const initialStatus: MessageStatus =\\\\\\\\n      data.skip_send || direction === 'internal' || direction === 'inbound'\\\\\\\\n        ? 'sent'\\\\\\\\n        : 'draft';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Generate thread ID for outbound emails if not provided\\\\\\\\n    let emailThreadId = data.email_thread_id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n    if (!emailThreadId &amp;&amp; data.message_type === 'email' &amp;&amp; direction === 'outbound') {\\\\\\\\n      emailThreadId = &#96;&lt;conv-${conversationId}@dna-me.crm&gt;&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 2. async function leadsRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (body.messages &amp;&amp; body.messages.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n        const { getConversationService } = await import('../../services/conversationService.js');\\\\\\\\n        const convService = getConversationService();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const deal = await db.queryOne&lt;{ id: string }&gt;(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;SELECT id FROM deals WHERE lead_id = $1 AND status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [lead.id],\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const firstSubject = body.messages.find(m =&gt; m.subject)?.subject || 'Importierter E-Mail-Verlauf';\\\\\\\\n        const conversation = await convService.findOrCreateConversation(\\\\\\\\n          lead.id,\\\\\\\\n          deal?.id ?? null,\\\\\\\\n          userId,\\\\\\\\n          firstSubject,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        conversationId = conversation.id;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const { getMessageService } = await import('../../services/messageService.js');\\\\\\\\n        const messageService = getMessageService();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const sortedMessages = [...body.messages].sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n          const da = a.sent_at ? new Date(a.sent_at).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n          const db2 = b.sent_at ? new Date(b.sent_at).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n          return da - db2;\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        for (const msg of sortedMessages) {\\\\\\\\n          const senderEmail = msg.direction === 'outbound'\\\\\\\\n            ? user?.email || 'system@dna-me.org'\\\\\\\\n            : body.email;\\\\\\\\n          const senderName = msg.direction === 'outbound'\\\\\\\\n            ? user?.name || 'Team'\\\\\\\\n            : [body.first_name, body.last_name].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || body.email;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n          await messageService.createMessage(conversationId, {\\\\\\\\n            message_type: 'email',\\\\\\\\n            direction: msg.direction,\\\\\\\\n            sender_email: senderEmail,\\\\\\\\n            sender_name: senderName,\\\\\\\\n            subject: msg.subject,\\\\\\\\n            body_text: msg.body_text,\\\\\\\\n            body_html: msg.body_html || &#96;&lt;p&gt;${msg.body_text.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/g, '&lt;br/&gt;')}&lt;/p&gt;&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            sent_at: msg.sent_at || new Date().toISOString(),\\\\\\\\n            skip_send: true,\\\\\\\\n          }, userId);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n          messagesImported++;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      request.log.info({\\\\\\\\n        leadId: lead.id,\\\\\\\\n        email: lead.email,\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"ranges\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":104,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":1},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":104,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8}},{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":104,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":105,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":3}},{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":792,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":3},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":792,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":3}},{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":826,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":5},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":827,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":7}}]},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"export class EmailSyncService {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n  // Process Incoming Email\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Processes a parsed email:\\\\\\\\n   *  1. Deduplicate by external_id (Message-ID)\\\\\\\\n   *  2. Match to existing conversation (multi-level strategy)\\\\\\\\n   *  3. Create or find conversation\\\\\\\\n   *  4. Store as message via MessageService\\\\\\\\n   *\\\\\\\\n   * Returns true if the email was a duplicate (skipped).\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  private async processIncomingEmail(\\\\\\\\n    email: ParsedEmail,\\\\\\\\n    account: EmailAccount\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    // 0. Skip system/bounce senders\\\\\\\\n    if (IGNORED_SENDER_PATTERNS.some(p =&gt; p.test(email.from.address))) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] Ignoring system sender: ${email.from.address}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      return true;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 1. Deduplication check\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await this.messageService.findByExternalId(email.messageId);\\\\\\\\n    if (existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return true; // duplicate\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 2. Determine direction (inbound vs outbound)\\\\\\\\n    const isOutbound = this.isOutboundEmail(email, account.email_address);\\\\\\\\n    const direction = isOutbound ? 'outbound' : 'inbound';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 3. Match to conversation\\\\\\\\n    const conversationId = await this.matchEmailToConversation(email, account);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] No matching lead/deal found for email &#96; +\\\\\\\\n        &#96;from ${email.from.address} — skipping&#96;\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      return false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 4. Build recipients list\\\\\\\\n    const recipients: MessageRecipient[] = [\\\\\\\\n      ...email.to.map((r) =&gt; ({ email: r.address, name: r.name, type: 'to' as const })),\\\\\\\\n      ...email.cc.map((r) =&gt; ({ email: r.address, name: r.name, type: 'cc' as const })),\\\\\\\\n    ];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 5. Create message via MessageService\\\\\\\\n    const messageInput: CreateMessageInput = {\\\\\\\\n      message_type: 'email'\\\\\\\\n,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"ranges\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":1},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8}},{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":92,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":3}}]},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"export class EmailSyncService {\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"isSignature\\\\\\\":true},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":425},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":426},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":427},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  // Process Incoming Email\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":428},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":429},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":430},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  /**\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":431},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"   * Processes a parsed email:\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":432},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"   *  1. In-Reply-To / References header (most reliable)\\\\\\\\n   *  2. Subject contains a Deal-ID tag (e.g. [#DEAL-abc123])\\\\\\\\n   *  3. Active deal with matching email contact\\\\\\\\n   *  4. Lead-level conversation (no deal)\\\\\\\\n   *  5. Create new conversation if a matching lead exists\\\\\\\\n   *\\\\\\\\n   * Returns the conversation ID, or null if no matching lead/deal was found.\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async matchEmailToConversation(\\\\\\\\n    email: ParsedEmail,\\\\\\\\n    account: EmailAccount\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;string | null&gt; {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Determine the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"contact\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" email — the external party\\\\\\\\n    const contactEmail = this.isOutboundEmail(email, account.email_address)\\\\\\\\n      ? this.findExternalRecipient(email, account.email_address)\\\\\\\\n      : email.from.address;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!contactEmail) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    // Strategy 1: In-Reply-To header → find message with matching external_id\\\\\\\\n    //             or email_thread_id\\\\\\\\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    if (email.inReplyTo) {\\\\\\\\n      const match = await this.matchByInReplyTo(email.inReplyTo);\\\\\\\\n      if (match) return match;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Also try all references\\\\\\\\n    for (const ref of email.references) {\\\\\\\\n      const match = await this.matchByInReplyTo(ref);\\\\\\\\n      if (match) return match;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    // Strategy 2: Subject contains Deal-ID tag, e.g. [#DEAL-&lt;uuid&gt;]\\\\\\\\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    const dealIdFromSubject = this.extractDealIdFromSubject(email.subject);\\\\\\\\n    if (dealIdFromSubject) {\\\\\\\\n      const match = await this.matchByDealId(dealIdFromSubject);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"ranges\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":1},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8}},{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":8},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":92,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":3}}]},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"export class EmailSyncService {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Strategy 3: Find conversation via active deal linked to lead whose email matches.\\\\\\\\n   * Prefers the most recently active conversation.\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  private async matchByActiveDeal(contactEmail: string): Promise&lt;string | null&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const matches = await db.query&lt;{ id: string }&gt;(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT c.id FROM conversations c\\\\\\\\n       JOIN deals d ON d.id = c.deal_id\\\\\\\\n       JOIN leads l ON l.id = d.lead_id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE l.email = $1\\\\\\\\n         AND d.status = 'open'\\\\\\\\n         AND c.status = 'active'\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [contactEmail],\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (matches.length {\\\\\\\\n          user: account.smtp_username!,\\\\\\\\n          pass: smtpPassword,\\\\\\\\n        },\\\\\\\\n        tls: { rejectUnauthorized: false },\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n references: message.email_thread_id ?? undefined,\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Store external message-id\\\\\\\\n      if (info.messageId) {\\\\\\\\n        await db.execute(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;UPDATE messages SET external_id = $1 WHERE id = $2 AND external_id IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [info.messageId, message.id]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n data.recipients = [{ email: lead.email, name, type: 'to' as const }];\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Auto-populate sender info from team member if not provided\\\\\\\\n    if &#96;${fromName} &lt;${fromEmail}&gt;&#96; : fromEmail;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const mailOptions = {\\\\\\\\n        from: fromAddress,\\\\\\\\n        to: Array.isArray(options.to) ? options.to.join(', ') : options.to,\\\\\\\\n        subject: options.subject,\\\\\\\\n        text: options.text,\\\\\\\\n        html: options.html,\\\\\\\\n        replyTo: options.replyTo,\\\\\\\\n        cc: options.cc ? const recipients = (message.recipients ?? class TriggerService {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n  // Action: Send Email\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  private async actionSendEmail(\\\\\\\\n    config: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;,\\\\\\\\n    context: TriggerContext\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;TriggerResult&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const { to, subject, html, text, from, fromName } = config;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!to || !subject) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new ValidationError('E-Mail benötigt: to, subject');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Lade Lead/Deal Daten für Template-Variablen\\\\\\\\n    const variables: Record&lt;string, string | number&gt; = {};\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if (context.lead_id) {\\\\\\\\n      const lead = await db.queryOne&lt;Lead&gt;(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT * FROM leads WHERE id = $1',\\\\\\\\n        [context.lead_id]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\n      if (lead) {\\\\\\\\n        variables.first_name = lead.first_name || '';\\\\\\\\n        variables.last_name = lead.last_name || '';\\\\\\\\n        variables.email = lead.email;\\\\\\\\n        variables.company = lead.organization_id ? await this.getOrganizationName(lead.organization_id) : '';\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (context.deal_id) {\\\\\\\\n      const deal = await db.queryOne&lt;Deal&gt;(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT * FROM deals WHERE id = $1',\\\\\\\\n        [context.deal_id]\\\\\\\\n * ImportedNoteCard\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Card on the lead show page to add a note that is imported into the chat\\\\\\\\n * as an internal_note (Notiz) with an \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"imported\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" marker.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { useState } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useRecordContext, useNotify } from 'react-admin';\\\\\\\\nimport {\\\\\\\\n  Card,\\\\\\\\n  CardContent,\\\\\\\\n  Typography,\\\\\\\\n  Box,\\\\\\\\n  Button,\\\\\\\\n  TextField as MuiTextField,\\\\\\\\n  CircularProgress,\\\\\\\\n  Alert,\\\\\\\\n} from '@mui/material';\\\\\\\\nimport { StickyNote2 as NoteIcon, CallMade as ImportIcon } from '@mui/icons-material';\\\\\\\\nimport { API_URL, httpClient } from '../../../providers/dataProvider';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function ImportedNoteCard({ onImported }) {\\\\\\\\n  const record = useRecordContext();\\\\\\\\n  const notify = useNotify();\\\\\\\\n  const [text, setText] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [error, setError] = useState(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!record?.id) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleSubmit = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const trimmed = text.trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!trimmed || saving) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    setSaving(true);\\\\\\\\n    setError(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const params = new URLSearchParams({ lead_id: record.id, limit: '1', sort_by: 'last_message_at', sort_order: 'desc' });\\\\\\\\n      const { json: listJson } = await httpClient(&#96;${API_URL}/conversations?${params}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      const conversations = listJson?.data ?? [];\\\\\\\\n      let conversationId = conversations[0]?.id;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n        const { json: createJson } = await httpClient(&#96;${API_URL}/conversations&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n          method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n          body: JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n            lead_id: record.id,\\\\\\\\n            type: 'internal',\\\\\\\\n            subject: 'Importierte Notizen',\\\\\\\\n          }),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n        const created = createJson?.data ?? createJson;\\\\\\\\n        conversationId = created?.id;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n        setError('Konversation konnte nicht erstellt werden.');\\\\\\\\n        setSaving(false);\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const bodyHtml = trimmed.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/g, '&lt;br/&gt;');\\\\\\\\n      await httpClient(&#96;${API_URL}/conversations/${conversationId}/messages&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n        method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\\\\\\\n          message_type: 'internal_note',\\\\\\\\n          direction: 'internal',\\\\\\\\n          body_text: trimmed,\\\\\\\\n          body_html: bodyHtml.startsWith('&lt;') ? bodyHtml : &#96;&lt;p&gt;${bodyHtml}&lt;/p&gt;&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          metadata: { imported: true },\\\\\\\\n        }),\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      setText('');\\\\\\\\n      notify('Notiz wurde in den Chat importiert.', { type: 'success' });\\\\\\\\n      onImported?.();\\\\\\\\n    } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('Imported note failed:', err);\\\\\\\\n      setError(err?.message || 'Notiz konnte nicht importiert werden.');\\\\\\\\n      notify(err?.message || 'Import fehlgeschlagen', { type: 'error' });\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      setSaving(false);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;Card&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;CardContent&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, mb: 2 }}&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;NoteIcon color=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" /&gt;\\\\\\\\n          &lt;Typography variant=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"h6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt; Alte Nachrichten in Chat importieren&lt;/Typography&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;Typography variant=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"body2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" color=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text.secondary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" sx={{ mb: 2 }}&gt;\\\\\\\\n          Text wird als Notiz in den Chat übernommen und dort als „Importiert“ gekennzeichnet.\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/Typography&gt;\\\\\\\\n        {error &amp;&amp; (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;Alert severity=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" onClose={() =&gt; setError(null)} sx={{ mb: 2 }}&gt;\\\\\\\\n            {error}\\\\\\\\n          &lt;/Alert&gt;\\\\\\\\n        )}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;MuiTextField\\\\\\\\n          fullWidth\\\\\\\\n          multiline\\\\\\\\n          minRows={3}\\\\\\\\n          maxRows={6}\\\\\\\\n          value={text}\\\\\\\\n          onChange={(e) =&gt; setText(e.target.value)}\\\\\\\\n          placeholder=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Nachrichtentext eingeben…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          size=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"small\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          disabled={saving}\\\\\\\\n          sx={{ mb: 2 }}\\\\\\\\n        /&gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;Button\\\\\\\\n          variant=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"contained\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          size=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"small\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          startIcon={saving ? &lt;CircularProgress size={16} /&gt; : &lt;ImportIcon /&gt;}\\\\\\\\n          onClick={handleSubmit}\\\\\\\\n          disabled={saving || !text.trim()}\\\\\\\\n        &gt;\\\\\\\\n          {saving ? 'Wird importiert…' : 'Als Notiz in Chat übernehmen'}\\\\\\\\n        &lt;/Button&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/CardContent&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/Card&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":127}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"e15f475a-2fb4-48d5-8fa5-e5c5614c84c6\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"30b858ef-136b-46fc-a3a8-7e598a1f75d5\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-23T12:33:57.277Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8978dfaf-18ff-482f-84bf-f3e75238c09\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_8978dfaf-18ff-482f-84bf-f3e75238c09\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"semantic_search_full\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"query\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"How are emails received from the notifikations mailbox and processed?\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"targetDirectories\\\\\\\":[],\\\\\\\"explanation\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":9,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"query\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"How are emails received from the notifikations mailbox and processed?\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"topK\\\\\\\":10,\\\\\\\"explanation\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"codeResults\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"codeBlock\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"relativeWorkspacePath\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\services\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\emailSyncService.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"range\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":90},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":922,\\\\\\\"column\\\\\\\":1}},\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"export class EmailSyncService {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n  // Process Incoming Email\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Processes a parsed email:\\\\\\\\n   *  1. Deduplicate by external_id (Message-ID)\\\\\\\\n   *  2. Match to existing conversation (multi-level strategy)\\\\\\\\n   *  3. Create or find conversation\\\\\\\\n   *  4. Store as message via MessageService\\\\\\\\n   *\\\\\\\\n   * Returns true if the email was a duplicate (skipped).\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  private async processIncomingEmail(\\\\\\\\n    email: ParsedEmail,\\\\\\\\n    account: EmailAccount\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    // 0. Skip system/bounce senders\\\\\\\\n    if (IGNORED_SENDER_PATTERNS.some(p =&gt; p.test(email.from.address))) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] Ignoring system sender: ${email.from.address}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      return true;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 1. Deduplication check\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await this.messageService.findByExternalId(email.messageId);\\\\\\\\n    if (existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return true; // duplicate\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 2. Determine direction (inbound vs outbound)\\\\\\\\n    const isOutbound = this.isOutboundEmail(email, account.email_address);\\\\\\\\n    const direction = isOutbound ? 'outbound' : 'inbound';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 3. Match to conversation\\\\\\\\n    const conversationId = await this.matchEmailToConversation(email, account);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] No matching lead/deal found for email &#96; +\\\\\\\\n        &#96;from ${email.from.address} — skipping&#96;\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      return false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 4. Build recipients list\\\\\\\\n    const recipients: MessageRecipient[] = [\\\\\\\\n      ...email.to.map((r) =&gt; ({ email: r.address, name: r.name, type: 'to' as const })),\\\\\\\\n      ...email.cc.map((r) =&gt; ({ email: r.address, name: r.name, type: 'cc' as const })),\\\\\\\\n    ];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 5. class EmailSyncService {\\\\\\\\nprivate fetchNewEmails(account: EmailAccount): Promise&lt;Buffer[]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n(resolve, reject) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      imap.once('ready', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] IMAP ready, opening INBOX...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        imap.openBox('INBOX', false, (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n          if (err) {\\\\\\\\n            imap.end();\\\\\\\\n            return fail(&#96;Failed to open INBOX: ${err.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n          console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] INBOX open, searching...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n          const searchCriteria = this.buildSearchCriteria(account.last_sync_at);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n          imap.search(searchCriteria, (searchErr, uids) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n            if (searchErr) {\\\\\\\\n              imap.end();\\\\\\\\n              return fail(&#96;IMAP search failed: ${searchErr.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            if (!uids || uids.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n              console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] No new emails&#96;);\\\\\\\\n              imap.end();\\\\\\\\n              return;\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            const limitedUids = uids.slice(-MAX_EMAILS_PER_SYNC);\\\\\\\\n            console.log(&#96;${LOG_PREFIX} [${account.email_address}] Fetching ${limitedUids.length} email(s)...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            const fetch = imap.fetch(limitedUids, { bodies: '', struct: true });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            fetch.on('message', (msg) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n              const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n              msg.on('body', (stream) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                stream.on('data', (chunk: Buffer) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                  chunks.push(chunk);\\\\\\\\n                });\\\\\\\\n              });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n              msg.once('end', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n                emails.push(Buffer.concat(chunks));\\\\\\\\n              });\\\\\\\\n            });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            fetch.once('error', (fetchErr: Error) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n              imap.end();\\\\\\\\n              fail(&#96;IMAP fetch failed: ${fetchErr.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n            });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n            fetch.once('end', () =&gt; Create message via MessageService\\\\\\\\n    const messageInput: CreateMessageInput = {\\\\\\\\n      message_type: 'email',\\\\\\\\n      direction,\\\\\\\\n      sender_email: email.from.address,\\\\\\\\n      sender_name: email.from.name,\\\\\\\\n      recipients,\\\\\\\\n      subject: email.subject,\\\\\\\\n      body_html: email.bodyHtml ?? undefined,\\\\\\\\n      body_text: email.bodyText ?? undefined,\\\\\\\\n      external_id: email.messageId,\\\\\\\\n      email_thread_id: email.inReplyTo ?? undefined,\\\\\\\\n      skip_send: true, // imported email, don't re-send\\\\\\\\n      sent_at: email.date.toISOString(),\\\\\\\\n      metadata: {\\\\\\\\n        sync_source: 'imap',\\\\\\\\n        account_id: account.id,\\\\\\\\n        references: email.references,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      attachments: email.attachments.length &gt; 0 ? email.attachments : undefined,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    await this.messageService.createMessage(\\\\\\\\n      conversationId,\\\\\\\\n      messageInput,\\\\\\\\n      account.team_member_id, // sender_id = the team member who owns the account\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return false; // not a duplicate\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n  // Match Email to Conversation – Multi-Level Strategy\\\\\\\\n  // ===========================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Attempts to match an incoming email to an existing conversation\\\\\\\\n   * using a prioritized multi-level strategy:\\\\\\\\n   *\\\\\\\\n   *  1. In-Reply-To / References header (most reliable)\\\\\\\\n   *  2. Subject contains a Deal-ID tag (e.g. [#DEAL-abc123])\\\\\\\\n   *  3. Active deal with matching email contact\\\\\\\\n   *  4. Lead-level conversation (no deal)\\\\\\\\n   *  5. sent,\\\\\\\\n    failed\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n//
